summary: Tested Bank Redeem 28-Day Cycle Rules. All 13 backend tests passed. Backend APIs correctly implement: Config returns cycle_days=28, Explorer user rejected with 403 'Active subscription required', Admin requests include subscription_active and subscription_plan fields. Frontend BankRedeemPage shows 28-day cycle info message. Frontend AdminBankTransfers has green/red subscription status indicators in code (verified via code review - admin login not available for UI testing).
critical_code_review_comments: manual_bank_transfer.py create_redeem_request() correctly checks subscription_plan for explorer/free users (403)
manual_bank_transfer.py create_redeem_request() correctly checks subscription_expiry for expired users (403)
manual_bank_transfer.py create_redeem_request() correctly enforces 28-day cycle limit (429)
manual_bank_transfer.py get_all_requests() correctly enriches each request with subscription_active and subscription_plan
BankRedeemPage.js line 579-588 shows 28-day cycle info message with data-testid='redeem-cycle-info'
AdminBankTransfers.js lines 547-554 shows green/red subscription status indicator in table
AdminBankTransfers.js lines 858-863 shows subscription status in modal with data-testid='modal-sub-status'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (BankRedeemPage 28-day cycle info verified, AdminBankTransfers code review passed)
